titleStmt.title: SII 28.109: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 109. (A.R. No. 264 of 1913.) ŚIṄGĀRATTŌPPU (NEAR CHIDAMBARAM), CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records an undertaking by six brāhmaṇas (Three of whom were brothers) who had the śiva-brāhmaṇa-kkāṇi in the temple of Tirukkārañcheṭiuḍaiyār of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr, a taṉiyūr in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu to burn a perpetual lamp with the interest on 1100 kāśu of which 1000 kāśu had been earmarked for oil for the lamp, 50 kāśu for the cloth-wick (tiruchchīlai) and 50 kāśu as the fee for the one engaged in burning the lamp. The name of the donee who was one of the āṇḍār worshipping in the temple (kumbiṭṭirukkum) is erased and not clear. There was an interesting stipulation that the capital amount deposited should be brought for inspection before the mūla-parushaiyār as also the tānattār and śrī māhēśvara-kkaṇkāṇi-cheyvār of the temple at the end of every five years for inspection and verification.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ maturai
koṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaru
ḷiṉa [śrī]kulottuṅkacoḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu pati
ṉeḻāvatu kaṉni nāyaṟṟu Irupattorān tiyati nāḷ Irājādhi
rājavaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr Uṭaiyār tirukkāra
ñceṭi Uṭaiyār koyil civappirāmaṇak kāṇi Uṭaiya māṭalaṉ ciṟiyāṇṭā
ṉ muttapiramiśvaramuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi ceṭināyaka paṭṭaṉum
Ivaṉ tampi Aḻakiya piramiśvaramuṭaiyāṉum pārattuvāci ceṭināyakaṉ
poṟkoyiṟ paṭṭaṉukku mutukaṇṇāṉa māṭalaṉ Uyyakkoṇṭi koṭiyāḻ
vāṉum Uromayaṉ caṅkaraṉ Aḷippirāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivva
kum koyil tāṉattārkkum kuṭutta Upaiyattiṭṭu Āḷuṭai
yaṉāyaṉār koyiliṟ kumpiṭṭirukkum Āṇṭār ruṭaiyār r Iṉ
ṉāyaṉār tirumuṉpu Eriya vaitta tirukkuttiviḷakku Uḷḷaccu nikki pitta
ḷai Iṭai nūṟṟiṉāl viḷakku Oṉṟil Erikkum nontā viḷakku Oṉ
ṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkāka veṇṭum Eṇṇaikkum tiricci
laikkum Erikūlikkum Uṭalāka policaikku Iṭṭu policai Ila
m koṇṭu celutta Ivar pakkal Upaiyamākak kaikkoṇṭa Eṇ
ṇaikku kācu 1000m tiriccilaikku kācu 5 10m Erikūlikku kācu 5 10 Āka kācu 1000 100
Ikkācu Āyirattoru nūṟum kaikkoṇṭu Ik kācāl vanta policai ko
ṇṭu Iṉṉāḷ mutal cantirātittavaṟ celvatākavum mutaṟkācu Āyiratto
runūṟum Aiyāṇṭu Aṟutiyāka Ikkoyilil vattikku mulaparu
ṣaiyārkkum Ikkoyilt tānattārkkum śrīmaheśvarak kaṇkā
ṇiceyvārkaḷukkum kāṭṭi varakkaṭavatākavum Ivarkaḷ Eḻuttiṭṭa
tiṭṭuppaṭi kalveṭṭu śrīmāheśvarar rakṣai pon_ svastiśrī pon_
Digital edition of SII 28.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
